value.found_quote: Claude Code is an agent that reads your codebase, edits files, and runs commands across your terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser. Build, debug, and ship with natural language.
value.rationale: The page is Anthropic's official Claude Code product page (https://www.anthropic.com/claude-code). It extensively describes Claude Code as a generally available product with download instructions, pricing tiers (Pro, Max 5x, Max 20x), integrations (macOS, Linux, Windows, VS Code, JetBrains, Slack, browser), and a detailed feature set. There is no indication of preview or beta status for the core offering — it is presented as an active, purchasable product.
